metadata.survey: NFHS-5 (National Family Health Survey, 2019-21), IIPS / MoHFW
metadata.note: Canonical NFHS-5 India national anaemia prevalence (headline factsheet figures, widely published). Anaemia impairs the body's ability to cope with heat stress and concentrates in the same groups most exposed to heat (poor households, women, children). Hypertension and diabetes prevalence are cited qualitatively in prose, not charted, pending primary-source verification.
